mapper.insert: insert into purchase_plan_entry_apply (purchase_plan_entry_id, bas_apply_entry_id, del_flag, tenant_id, create_by, create_time) values (#{purchasePlanEntryId}, #{basApplyEntryId}, '0', #{tenantId}, #{createBy}, #{createTime})

insert into purchase_plan_entry_apply (purchase_plan_entry_id, bas_apply_entry_id, del_flag, tenant_id, create_by, create_time) values
(#{item.purchasePlanEntryId}, #{item.basApplyEntryId}, '0', #{item.tenantId}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime})
mapper.update: update purchase_plan_entry_apply set del_flag = '1', delete_by = #{deleteBy}, delete_time = now(), update_time = now() where purchase_plan_entry_id = #{purchasePlanEntryId} and tenant_id = #{tenantId} and (del_flag = '0' or del_flag is null)

update purchase_plan_entry_apply r inner join purchase_plan_entry e on r.purchase_plan_entry_id = e.id and e.tenant_id = #{tenantId} set r.del_flag = '1', r.delete_by = #{deleteBy}, r.delete_time = now(), r.update_time = now() where e.parent_id = #{planId} and r.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and (r.del_flag = '0' or r.del_flag is null)
mapper.select: select a.apply_bill_no as applyBillNo, d.name as departmentName, e.qty as qty, coalesce(cu.nick_name, cu.user_name) as createByName, a.create_time as createTime, coalesce(au.nick_name, au.user_name) as auditByName, a.audit_date as auditTime from purchase_plan_entry_apply r inner join bas_apply_entry e on r.bas_apply_entry_id = e.id and e.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and (e.del_flag is null or e.del_flag != 1) inner join bas_apply a on e.paren_id = a.id and a.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and (a.del_flag = 0 or a.del_flag is null) left join fd_department d on a.department_id = d.id left join sys_user cu on a.create_by = cu.user_id left join sys_user au on a.audit_by = au.user_id where r.purchase_plan_entry_id = #{entryId} and r.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and (r.del_flag = '0' or r.del_flag is null) order by a.apply_bill_no, e.id

select distinct a.apply_bill_no from purchase_plan_entry_apply r inner join purchase_plan_entry e on r.purchase_plan_entry_id = e.id and e.tenant_id = #{tenantId} inner join bas_apply_entry be on r.bas_apply_entry_id = be.id and be.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and (be.del_flag is null or be.del_flag != 1) inner join bas_apply a on be.paren_id = a.id and a.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and (a.del_flag = 0 or a.del_flag is null) where e.parent_id = #{planId} and r.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and (r.del_flag = '0' or r.del_flag is null) and a.apply_bill_no is not null and a.apply_bill_no != '' order by a.apply_bill_no
